hotspots.title: Manuel Adorni corruption scandal deepens
hotspots.blurb: The illicit enrichment case against Argentina's Cabinet Chief Manuel Adorni has escalated with new evidence, including crypto wallets and luxury travel payments. Multiple articles detail judicial investigations, contractor testimonies, and political fallout.
hotspots.affect: This scandal commands disproportionate attention due to its high-profile nature, moral outrage over corruption allegations, and potential to destabilize the Milei administration.

hotspots.title: Javier Milei’s coup allegations and inflation battle
hotspots.blurb: President Milei continues to allege a coup attempt by political opponents, media, and business sectors while celebrating a drop in inflation. Multiple articles cover his accusations, economic policies, and declining approval ratings.
hotspots.affect: The coup rhetoric and economic struggles create a charged narrative of existential stakes for Milei's presidency, fueling intense affective investment.

hotspots.title: Trump-Xi summit amid Iran war tensions
hotspots.blurb: President Trump's summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing focused on trade, Taiwan, and Iran, with mixed signals on cooperation. The summit's outcomes and Trump's rhetoric on Iran have dominated coverage.
hotspots.affect: The summit's geopolitical stakes, particularly regarding Iran and Taiwan, command intense attention due to the potential for global conflict and economic disruption.

hotspots.title: AfD’s poll surge and leadership ambitions
hotspots.blurb: Germany's AfD is leading polls in Saxony-Anhalt and Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, with plans to replace hundreds of civil service positions if elected. The party's ties to extremist groups and Kremlin praise have intensified scrutiny.
hotspots.affect: AfD's rise and authoritarian plans evoke strong emotional responses, including fear, outrage, and moral panic over democratic backsliding.

hotspots.title: Far-right protests and UK bans
hotspots.blurb: The UK has banned 11 far-right figures from entering ahead of Tommy Robinson's London rally, amid counter-protests and heightened security measures. The event has sparked debates over free speech and public safety.
hotspots.affect: The rally and bans command attention due to fears of violence, moral outrage over far-right extremism, and polarized debates on immigration and free speech.
